_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY HYDRODACTYL PANEL
name: Velocity
author: support@pterodactyl.io
description: Velocity is a Minecraft server proxy with unparalleled server support, scalability, and flexibility. Uses the itzg/mc-proxy Docker image.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# Velocity installation script
# itzg/mc-proxy handles server jar download at container start
mkdir -p /mnt/server

variables.name: Server Type
variables.description: The type of proxy to run. Fixed for this egg.

variables.name: Proxy Version
variables.description: The version of the proxy to run. Set to LATEST for the latest release.

variables.name: Max Memory
variables.description: Maximum memory allocated to the Java heap (e.g., 1G, 512M).

variables.name: Online Mode
variables.description: Whether to authenticate players with Mojang servers. Set FALSE for offline/cracked servers.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players that can connect through the proxy.
